subject: WM-0163 review: changes_requested
body: High: the 100000-tick gate is a false green for jobs/reservations. game-session-tick phases 4/5 create or advance no job/reservation, diagnostics labels any legitimate active job/reservation as a leak immediately, and both CLI runs report jobTerminalCount=0/activeReservationCount=0. High: canonical world/read-model hashes omit authoritative lanes; distinct comfort-vs-social mutations with equal owner versions produced identical world and read hashes, so Worker/headless parity can miss divergence. Medium: the hot tick path calls allocating NeedStore/NeedUrgency metrics/result APIs every tick and per changed lane. Require a real bounded existing-store job/reservation lifecycle with non-zero peak/terminal evidence and correct total conservation, canonical hashing of all PR-1 authoritative/read-model facts with collision tests, and no-allocation hot-path integration. Focused/CLI/quality/coordination gates pass but do not close these semantic findings.
